journal_ui.notes: The Journal opens from the book icon and shows player-facing quest summaries only.

entries.title: The Missing Alchemist
entries.source_summary: Wymarc suspected Etheldreda was taken near Gravenhold Manor and did not leave willingly.
entries.quest_summary: Etheldreda was rescued from beneath Gravenhold Manor after being forced to brew for the Boggart Boss.

objectives.text: Defeat the Boggart Boss beneath the manor.

entries.completion_note: Etheldreda is safe and Wymarc owes the party a reward.

entries.title: The Restless Dead
entries.source_summary: The graveyard east of Umberhold no longer lets the dead rest, and the rear mausoleum stair may lead to the source.
entries.quest_summary: Something has disturbed the graveyard east of Umberhold. The dead are said to scratch beneath the earth, and a dark stair in the rear mausoleum leads below.

objectives.text: Descend the dark stair in the rear mausoleum.

entries.title: Troll Trouble
entries.source_summary: Trolls below the village well have seized the water source and forced tribute from the villagers.
entries.quest_summary: There is no dungeon below the well—only a rope descent into immediate combat. If the party goes down, they should be ready to fight at once.

objectives.text: Descend into the well using the rope and bucket.
Kill the trolls below and climb back out.
